channel.title: Muttaquee — Blog
channel.description: Weekly notes on AI-driven MetaHumans, immersive brand engagement, VR and HCI research.

item.title: Open the Car Door for Me: Teaching an AI MetaHuman to Act, Not Just Talk
item.description: My second case study takes the AI MetaHuman from a virtual guide that talks and follows to a virtual assistant that acts on your command inside a car showroom.

item.title: Would You Trust an AI MetaHuman to Show You Your Next Home?
item.description: Exploring how AI-driven digital humans could transform property viewing in Virtual Reality.

item.title: What Happens When AI MetaHumans Start Thinking in Real Time?
item.description: Inside the Intelligence Layer of Virtual Humans in Immersive Environments

item.title: Beyond the Screen: Why the Future of Branding Belongs to AI MetaHumans
item.description: Moving beyond static ads to explore how intelligent, AI-driven MetaHumans are completely redefining how we experience and interact with brands in virtual worlds.
